message:
feat(dpor): sleep set optimization, HB-race detection, and coverage analysis

Enhance the DPOR (Dynamic Partial Order Reduction) subsystem with three
capabilities for more efficient and measurable state space exploration:

1. src/trace/dpor.rs (+209 lines) — Add ResourceRaceDistribution for
   per-resource race counting. Add SleepSet for deduplicating backtrack
   points across exploration runs (skip points with identical race
   structure at identical positions). Add TraceCoverageAnalysis and
   trace_coverage_analysis() for unified coverage metrics combining
   immediate races, HB-races, backtrack points, estimated equivalence
   classes, and resource race distribution.

2. src/trace/divergence.rs — Fix clippy lints throughout: replace
   format!("{:?}", x) with format!("{x:?}"), eliminate match-with-
   single-arm using if-let, fix usize-to-f64 casts via u32 clamping,
   remove duplicate import, add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on
   long diagnostic functions.

3. src/trace/mod.rs — Re-export new types: SleepSet,
   ResourceRaceDistribution, TraceCoverageAnalysis,
   trace_coverage_analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
